name: coinor-libcoinutils3v5
title: coinor-libcoinutils3v5
summary: COIN-OR collection of utility classes (shared libraries)
description:
COIN-OR collection of utility classes (shared libraries)
CoinUtils (COIN-OR Utilities) is a collection of classes and functions
that are generally useful to more than one COIN-OR project.  These include
classes for vectors, matrices, mps file reading, and functions for
floating-point comparisons.
.
The Computational Infrastructure for Operations Research (COIN-OR, or simply
COIN) project is an initiative to spur the development of open source software
for the operations research community.
.
This package contains the shared libraries.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use coinor-libcoinutils3v5 because COIN-OR collection of utility classes (shared libraries).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use coinor-libcoinutils3v5 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair coinor-libcoinutils3v5 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `coinor-libcoinutils3v5 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
